About Global Engineering Agency

Building Rwanda's
Future Since 2018.

Global Engineering Agency (GEA) is committed to delivering reliable engineering, construction, real estate, and building material solutions with professionalism, innovation, and integrity.

Contact UsOur Story
0+Years of Excellence
0+Completed Projects
0+Building Products
0%Client Satisfaction
Who We Are

We are more than a construction company — we are a partner in building Rwanda's future.

Global Engineering Agency is a trusted engineering and construction company committed to delivering innovative, reliable, and sustainable solutions — helping individuals, businesses, and organisations bring ambitious projects to life.

On-site in Kigali, Rwanda
01

Engineering

Structural, MEP & civil design.

02

Construction

Residential & commercial builds.

03

Materials Supply

Tiles, bathware & hardware.

04

Real Estate

Development & investment advisory.

What We Stand For
Our Story

Our journey.

From a single vision in 2018 to an integrated engineering, construction, and property group.

01

2018

GEA was established with a vision of delivering reliable engineering and construction solutions in Rwanda.

02

2020

Expanded operations into supplying premium building materials, bridging the gap between supply and construction.

03

2022

Added professional real estate services, creating a truly integrated property solutions firm.

04

Today

Serving clients across Rwanda with an end-to-end suite of engineering, construction, and property expertise.

Our Direction

Purpose-built for progress.

Everything we build is guided by a clear mission and a long-term vision for what Rwanda's built environment can become.

0101 — Our Mission

Deliver with integrity, every time.

To deliver reliable engineering, construction, and building material solutions with professionalism, innovation, and integrity — helping our clients bring ambitious projects to life, on time and on budget.

0202 — Our Vision

Rwanda’s most trusted building partner.

To be Rwanda’s most trusted, integrated engineering and construction partner — recognised across the region for quality, reliability, and long-term value creation.

What We Stand For

Our Values

The principles that guide every decision, every site, and every client relationship.

01

Integrity

Doing what is right, even when no one is watching.

02

Excellence

Setting the standard in every project we deliver.

03

Innovation

Forward-thinking solutions to complex challenges.

04

Safety

Uncompromising standards on every site, every time.

05

Teamwork

Collaboration across every discipline and level.

06

Customer First

Your vision drives every decision we make.

Leadership

The people behind GEA.

01

Michael Okenwa

Managing Director

Over 20 years leading complex engineering and architectural projects across Africa and the Middle East.

Sarah Al-Fayed

Head of Architecture

David Chen

Chief of Procurement

Sectors

Industries we serve.

01

Residential

Premium homes, estates, and housing developments.

02

Commercial

Office spaces, retail centres, and mixed-use buildings.

03

Industrial

Warehouses, factories, and logistics facilities.

04

Hospitality

Hotels, resorts, and high-end leisure spaces.

05

Government

Public sector buildings and civic infrastructure.

06

Infrastructure

Roads, bridges, and large-scale civil works.

Why Choose GEA

The blueprint for certainty.

01

7+ Years of Delivery

Since 2018 — a proven track record of complex projects delivered on time and on budget.

02

Certified Professionals

A qualified, experienced team held to rigorous engineering and safety standards.

03

Fully Integrated

Engineering, supply, and property advisory under a single accountable partner.

04

Reliable Delivery

Disciplined project management that keeps every build on schedule.

05

Uncompromising Quality

Every material, finish, and structure held to a premium standard.

06

Long-Term Partnerships

Clients return to GEA project after project — that is our real track record.
